# GitHub About Settings

GitHub topics and the About description are repository metadata, not versioned repository configuration. After creating the remote repository, paste the following values into the repository's **About** settings.

## Description

Human-readable Obsidian knowledge bases maintained by people and AI agents: source cards, learning feedback, traceable Markdown, and durable wiki pages.

## Topics

`obsidian`, `knowledge-base`, `personal-knowledge-management`, `knowledge-management`, `markdown`, `ai-agents`, `agent-skills`, `llm`, `reading-notes`, `zettelkasten`, `knowledge-graph`, `pkm`

## Suggested Repository Name

`llm-wiki`

## Suggested Social Preview Copy

**A knowledge base you can read, question, and maintain with AI.**

External originals stay outside the vault. Reading cards preserve sources, your understanding, objections, and next questions in plain Markdown.
